LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTORNEY EDWARD C. CASEY, JR.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF STEVEN MALONE. DISCUSSED AND TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF THEIR DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES FILED BY DEFENDANT FORDE, BARBARA THE SAN FRANCISCO FOOD BANK

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS THE SAN FRANCISCO FOOD BANK AND BARBARA FORDE'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES - AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 4, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FORDE. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT BEYOND EMPLOYEE MANAGEMENT ACTIVITY. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS THE SAN FRANCISCO FOOD BANK AND BARBARA FORDE'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES - AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 4, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FORDE. AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT BEYOND EMPLOYEE MANAGEMENT ACTIVITY. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
